title: Time Zone Converter - World Clock & Time Difference
description: Free time zone converter. Convert time between major world time zones instantly. Find the time difference between any two cities.
keywords: time zone converter, world clock, time difference calculator, UTC converter, international time zones
intro: Convert time between world time zones. Select source and target zones, enter a time, and get the converted result instantly.

faq.a: UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) is the primary time standard. All time zones are defined as offsets from UTC (e.g., EST = UTC-5).

faq.q: How many time zones are there?
faq.a: There are 24 standard time zones, but some regions use half-hour or quarter-hour offsets, resulting in about 38 practical time zones.

faq.q: Does this account for daylight saving time?
faq.a: This converter uses fixed UTC offsets. During DST periods, you may need to adjust by 1 hour for affected zones.
